# s2_basin (Data Source)

Fetches an S2 basin by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "s2_basin" "example" {
  name = "my-example-basin"
}

output "basin_scope" {
  value = data.s2_basin.example.scope
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `create_stream_on_append` (Boolean)
- `create_stream_on_read` (Boolean)
- `default_stream_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default_stream_config))
- `scope` (String)
- `state` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--default_stream_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_stream_config`

Read-Only:

- `delete_on_empty` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default_stream_config--delete_on_empty))
- `retention_policy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default_stream_config--retention_policy))
- `storage_class` (String)
- `timestamping` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default_stream_config--timestamping))

<a id="nestedatt--default_stream_config--delete_on_empty"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_stream_config.delete_on_empty`

Read-Only:

- `min_age_secs` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--default_stream_config--retention_policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_stream_config.retention_policy`

Read-Only:

- `age` (Number)
- `infinite` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedatt--default_stream_config--timestamping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_stream_config.timestamping`

Read-Only:

- `mode` (String)
- `uncapped` (Boolean)
